mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_in_stu_ans_info (id, logId, courseId, classroomId, testId, paperId, libId, stuId, questionTypeId, questionContent, difficultLevel, libScore, libStuScore, createTime, kwaId) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.logId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.classroomId}, #{item.testId}, #{item.paperId}, #{item.libId}, #{item.stuId}, #{item.questionTypeId}, #{item.questionContent}, #{item.difficultLevel}, #{item.libScore}, #{item.libStuScore}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.kwaId})
